headline: Unified Airport Command Centre
caption: AIonOS opens a live airport intelligence layer across landside, terminal, airside and building systems — powered by SMART connectivity.

headline: Arrival Surge Predicted Before Congestion Forms
caption: The Passenger Flow Agent detects an inbound surge while car park and transport agents prepare capacity before the queues become visible.

headline: Pedestrian Speed Signals Flag Peak Pressure
caption: Real-time motion analytics detect fast-forming pressure zones and trigger preemptive queue routing before bottlenecks escalate.

headline: Crowd Heatmaps Trigger Staff Repositioning
caption: AIonOS converts anonymous mobility signals into crowd heatmaps and automatically recommends staffing, queue routing and wayfinding changes.

headline: Terminal Operations Become Self-Aware
caption: Inside the terminal, every gate, trolley, kiosk, wheelchair, retail zone and passenger flow becomes part of one operating model.

headline: Belt Throughput Balancing Cuts Queue Spillover
caption: Conveyor utilization and arrival waves are synchronized to reduce claim-area buildup and improve passenger movement.

headline: Baggage Mismatch Risk Detected Early
caption: The Baggage Intelligence Agent tracks bag movement, flags mismatch risk and alerts teams before boarding cut-off.

headline: Pre-Board Queue Segmentation Keeps Gates Fluid
caption: The system separates boarding groups earlier and reduces congestion at gate touchpoints before final calls begin.

headline: Passenger Walk-Up Patterns Optimised
caption: Agent-driven prompts and lane balancing smooth walk-up cadence to protect turnaround timing.

headline: Boarding Sequence Re-Optimised in Real Time
caption: The Gate and Boarding Ops Agent monitors passenger density, protects jet bridge flow and resequences boarding to recover departure punctuality.

headline: Turnaround Risk Repaired Before It Cascades
caption: Airside agents track GSE, monitor turnaround tasks, detect zone violations and assign the nearest crew or equipment to protect departure time.

headline: FOD Alert Dispatched in Under 30 Seconds
caption: The FOD and Runway Safety Agent uses AI camera feeds to detect runway debris and trigger the nearest response workflow instantly.

headline: The Airport Building Becomes Self-Optimising
caption: AI HVAC, lighting, fire safety, energy, ESG and vertical transport agents coordinate through one AI-BMS operations centre.

headline: Weather Disruption Plans Trigger Automatically
caption: When weather risk rises, AIonOS pre-builds de-icing, gate and crew alternatives to protect network continuity.

headline: One AI-Native Airport Operating System
caption: SMART provides the trusted connectivity fabric. AIonOS provides the intelligence layer. Together they convert airport complexity into coordinated action.
